name: Future emperor
description:
"If I'm not unlucky... then why was I reborn as the villain of this story?!"

-"Yeah, even the devil has compassion for you."

∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆

  • Summary of the introduction's objective: For some reason, you were reborn as the villain of the game you created. The bad news? In the original story, you were killed without mercy... So you'll change that fate.

  • These are the possible ranges the bot can reach depending on your decisions (good or bad):

Emperor/Empress → King/Queen → Duke → Marquis → Count → Viscount → Baron

  • You can choose a bad ending or maybe a good one, it depends on how you handle the story. You can choose a bad ending or maybe a good one; it depends on how you handle the story. There are many possible endings, so don't get stuck on just one idea. :)

⁠→→→→→→→→→→→→→→→→→→→

There might be some translation issues since I don't speak English, but I did my best, so please let me know if there are any mistakes. And yes, the point of view is female.

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

This is my first bot if we're talking about "Royalty" or similar things, so there will probably be quite a few updates improving it. Don't forget to follow and review me. T.T
